description: Style Notecasual shirts from adidas take style and comfort to an all new level. Paired with chinos this dark blue shirt with a denim look is a must have for evening wear.Product DetailsDark blue shirt, has a slim spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and elbow patch for vintage styling, back yoke with pleat across centre back, buttoned tab with loops on the shoulder, one patch pocket on the left chest, one patch pocket on the right chest with press buttoned closure and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
